programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Miss Jones reports a prowler to the police and it is not long before an inspector calls to investigate - but, unfortunately for Rigsby, he is not all he seems. George Sewell guest stars in the classic comedy, with Leonard Rossiter and Frances de la Tour

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Rigsby tries to drum up support for his local election candidate, but finds Alan and Philip have other ideas about who should represent their interests. Leonard Rossiter, Frances de la Tour, Richard Beckinsale and Don Warrington star

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A blizzard forces the sleuthing spinster to spend a night in isolated Sittaford House, situated on a Devon moor. Without explanation, the building's owner, up-and-coming politician Clive Trevelyan, decides to spend the evening in a local hotel - only for a Ouija board to predict his murder. Mystery drama with an all-star cast, including Geraldine McEwan, Robert Hardy, Matthew Kelly, Patricia Hodge and Mel Smith

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Sgt Merton finds himself under pressure when teenagers commit serious offences in the area and must race to stop a planned 'chicken run' with stolen cars. The youngsters are also suspected of drug dealing after Liz Merrick hands in amphetamines found in a local boy's bedroom, and Merton's investigative techniques lead Jenny to call off the wedding. Starring Duncan Bell, Sarah Tansey and Aislin McGuckin

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Kim wants to talk money with Chris. Alan is getting fed up of his lodgers. Chris presumes that Rachel is having an affair with Steve

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Mandy tells Zak that Lisa should come and live with the Dingles. Kathy is shocked when Kim comes to visit her and wants the two of them to be friends

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Vicky tells Nick she is willing to take the blame to stop Steve going to prison. Alec plans to view Reg's flat, but Maureen tells him it's no longer for sale

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ken goes to Keele leaving Kelly looking after Daniel. Don spends the day at the garage, observing how it works

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A gathering at the Devon estate of Miss Marple's old school friend Lady Tressilian leads to murder when the eccentric Mr Treves tells the story of an unconvicted child killer. Miss Marple is on hand to assist Supt Mallard of the local constabulary, but not before a second victim is claimed. Mystery, starring Geraldine McEwan, with guest appearances by Eileen Atkins, Tom Baker, Paul Nicholls, Alan Davies and Greg Wise, with a cameo by former British number-one tennis player Greg Rusedski

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Sgt Merton finds himself under pressure when teenagers commit serious offences in the area and must race to stop a planned 'chicken run' with stolen cars. The youngsters are also suspected of drug dealing after Liz Merrick hands in amphetamines found in a local boy's bedroom, and Merton's investigative techniques lead Jenny to call off the wedding. Starring Duncan Bell, Sarah Tansey and Aislin McGuckin

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Mr Carson and Mrs Hughes' wedding is fast approaching, but a misunderstanding threatens to derail the occasion, and when the big day arrives it also brings a few unexpected guests. Meanwhile, Edith reconnects with an old acquaintance, who comes to her aid in her hour of need, and over at the Dower House, Spratt has something to hide, meaning Denker is hot on his trail. Daisy jumps to conclusions about one of the countess's plots, and tensions mount over the hospital takeover, prompting Isobel to offend a friend. Period drama, starring Jim Carter, Phyllis Logan, Elizabeth McGovern and Laura Carmichael

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Art comes to the Midsomer village of Angel's Rise with the opening of a new sculpture park, but when its launch is marred by murder, DCI Barnaby and DS Nelson are called to investigate. However, they must deal with an apparently unexplainable broken locket found near the scene of the crime, a host of suspects, and a complex web of deception. As the crime solving duo inspect further, they find they have to get creative to solve a case where art imitates death and everything has a deeper meaning

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Two children go on trial for killing a toddler, each blaming the other, and the case hinges on whether forensic evidence can prove who is guilty of strangling the boy to death. CPS director George Castle defies his superiors and takes instruction from the victim's mother, who has a surprising point of view on the crime. Drama, guest starring Deborah Findlay (Cranford), with Bill Paterson

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Rachel discovers Nick has been brutally assaulted - and she is top of the list of suspects. But even worse, she has no recollection of the previous night after a drunken hen party, and struggles to convince herself she did not do it. Janet thinks she has made her peace with Andy, until he gives her some misinformation that results in Gill missing an appointment with the coroner - so the DCI, tired of their games, announces one of them will have to go. A man's accidental death turns into a murder investigation when his daughters reveal their mother often talked of killing him. Crime drama, starring Lesley Sharp and Suranne Jones

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: An American tourist's body is discovered in her hotel room, apparently dead from a heart attack - but a valuable Anglo-Saxon jewel she intended to donate to the Ashmolean Museum is missing and several interested parties are acting strangely. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Simon Callow, Roberta Taylor and Kenneth Cranham

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: A prominent bank manager is almost killed by a hit-and-run driver just before he is due to set sail on the luxury liner Queen Mary. Convinced his life is in danger, he persuades Poirot to accompany him - and his valuable shipment of liberty bonds - to New York. But the Belgian sleuth's main concern is his own terrible sea-sickness. David Suchet stars

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Alan smuggles a woman up to his room, making sure the lights are turned down low so she cannot see how shabby it is - but an unscheduled appearance by her irate father soon puts paid to his dreams of romance. Leonard Rossiter and Richard Beckinsale star

programme.title: Rising Damp
programme.desc: Alan and Philip goad Rigsby into fasting for three days - and it is not long before he is stealing Vienna's cat food to stave off the pangs of hunger. With Leonard Rossiter and Richard Beckinsale

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: Robert's got a new job as a GP in Yorkshire, but how will he tell Ida that they're moving away?

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: A gathering at the Devon estate of Miss Marple's old school friend Lady Tressilian leads to murder when the eccentric Mr Treves tells the story of an unconvicted child killer. Miss Marple is on hand to assist Supt Mallard of the local constabulary, but not before a second victim is claimed. Mystery, starring Geraldine McEwan, with guest appearances by Eileen Atkins, Tom Baker, Paul Nicholls, Alan Davies and Greg Wise, with a cameo by former British number-one tennis player Greg Rusedski

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: PC Steve Crane takes an urgent phone call, and is shocked to discover Peter Pyke's warehouse has gone up in smoke. It soon emerges that the owner's wife had spent time behind bars for fraud, and her husband is reluctant to answer questions - leading Merton to suspect the blaze was deliberate. Meanwhile, Vernon moves into his new mansion, but has trouble keeping up with his well-to-do neighbours. Rural drama, starring James Carlton, Duncan Bell and Geoffrey Hughes

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: It is a tense day in the Glover household when the inquest into Dave's death begins. Chris urges Frank to prove that James is his child by getting a paternity test

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Seth forgets Betty's birthday leading him to pretend he has a surprise planned. Jan apologises for hitting Kathy. Zak tidies the Dingle household after inviting Lisa for dinner

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Emily sees Ashley leaving Ken's first thing in the morning. Deirdre discovers Alec is short staffed and offers her services. Steve tells Fiona he was wrong to go off with Vicky

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve and Vicky go before the Magistrates charged with perverting the course of justice. Ken tells Kelly she must be careful about what goes on in his house

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Geraldine McEwan makes her last appearance as the spinster sleuth before handing over the knitting needles to Julia McKenzie. Following the death of old acquaintance Mr Rafiel, Miss Marple receives instructions drawn up prior to his demise asking her to embark on a coach tour to investigate an unspecified possible crime. It soon transpires that many of her companions are also travelling at his invitation and they are all in some way connected to a girl who went missing from a nun's sanctuary during World War Two, supposedly to be with her German lover, Rafiel's son Michael. Murder mystery, with a star-studded supporting cast including Richard E Grant, Johnny Briggs, Amanda Burton, Anne Reid, Ronni Ancona, George Cole, Will Mellor and Laura Michelle Kelly

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: PC Steve Crane takes an urgent phone call, and is shocked to discover Peter Pyke's warehouse has gone up in smoke. It soon emerges that the owner's wife had spent time behind bars for fraud, and her husband is reluctant to answer questions - leading Merton to suspect the blaze was deliberate. Meanwhile, Vernon moves into his new mansion, but has trouble keeping up with his well-to-do neighbours. Rural drama, starring James Carlton, Duncan Bell and Geoffrey Hughes

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Tom and Sybbie return to Downton, but the peace is disrupted by an unexpected visit from an old friend. Baxter is faced with a dilemma after an encounter with Sergeant Willis, while Thomas struggles to fill Carson's shoes. Anna goes to London with Mary to deal with a crisis, while her secrets seem likely to be exposed. Daisy is not happy with Cora, and Mary has an admirer

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa's hippie mother Eleanor (Louise Jameson) arrives in the village, immediately taking over Martin's kitchen to prepare a herbal tonic, which she later gives to the baby to stop his crying. A culinary rivalry develops between Bert and Mark Bridge, the landlord of the Crab and Lobster pub, at Portwenn Fun Day, with both keen to take advantage of the event by providing food for the spectators

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: PC Penhale is shocked by the unexpected arrival of his ex-wife Maggie (Julie Graham), who appears to have forgotten that they separated years ago and wants to know why he left her. Eleanor goes on a date with local fisherman Paul Hale, an old friend she has not seen since school, while Martin and Louisa finally agree on a name for their baby - James Henry. With Martin Clunes, John Marquez and Caroline Catz

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When a 16-year-old girl is found dead in her home, Brooks and Devlin cannot be sure a crime was even committed. On further investigation, an unlikely murder weapon is uncovered and a suspect identified - a recently released serial rapist. Determined the accused is guilty, Steel pursues him with every power available - pushing the boundaries of the law to the limit. Crime drama, guest starring Kevin Doyle (Drop Dead Gorgeous), with Ben Daniels

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Called to the home of an elderly couple who haven't been seen for a while, Janet discovers Eunice Bevan's severed head at the bottom of the stairs, her body at the top, and her husband Joe in bed, emaciated and barely able to speak. Meanwhile, the detective puts her house on the market, admitting her relationship with Ade is over, and three months in to Rachel's marriage to traffic cop Sean, she's starting to feel a little claustrophobic. George Costigan and Nicola Walker guest star, with Lesley Sharp and Suranne Jones

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Oxford detective faces a tough time while looking into a murder at a peaceful college. After suffering the familiar pangs of unrequited love, he clashes with the unpleasant college master and then unwittingly provides his main suspects with a watertight alibi. John Thaw and Kevin Whately star, with Robert Stephens, Amanda Burton and Philip Middlemiss

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The Belgian sleuth is asked to vet potential suitors vying for the hand of an Australian heiress and discreetly accompanies her on a rail journey aboard the Plymouth Express, only to find himself investigating a jewel theft. Mystery, with David Suchet and Julian Wadham

programme.title: ITV3 Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood presents action from obscure motorsports, such as bus and caravan racing and ice speedway

programme.title: Only When I Laugh
programme.desc: An MP renowned for his stance against the cost of the NHS is admitted to the men's ward for treatment, causing much unrest for the long-suffering patients

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Templar plays his part in a gangster's plot to trick his four greatest enemies into carrying out a robbery. Stephanie Beacham features in an early role, alongside Roger Moore

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Part one of two. Robin and the outlaws leave Sherwood to defend a distant village from a band of phantom horsemen known as the Hounds of Lucifer, who terrorise the countryside on the orders of a powerful coven ruled by Morgwyn of Ravenscar. Guest starring Rula Lenska

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Harriet poses as a journalist in an attempt to track a notorious criminal trying to muscle in on London's organised crime scene, and soon becomes embroiled in the machinations of a crafty French jewel thief. Police drama, starring Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur gets his hands on the unreleased recording of a late, lamented pop star's final song, and decides to launch himself as a music-biz entrepreneur. Mel Smith guest stars, with George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 investigates the fatal shooting of a South American president's son at a polo match, and finds that the victim's step-sister is unknowingly dating one of the terrorists involved. Ruby Wax and Pierce Brosnan feature in early screen appearances, alongside stars Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter uncover a plot to smuggle gold bars into the Middle East disguised as weights for an international strongman competition. Police drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar investigates when a trusted diplomat friend goes missing with $1million, while his daughter is adducted. Robert Hardy guest stars, with Roger Moore

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Robin is trapped on a lonely hillside by the Sheriff's men, and sacrifices his life so that Much and Marian can escape. Michael Praed stars, making his last appearance as the legendary hero

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Dempsey finds himself the target of a crazed female admirer. Guest starring Elizabeth Sladen and Suzi Quatro

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Richard Henwood takes a look back at the glory days of British Wrestling, with some classic action from the archives.

programme.title: European Cup - Champions League Revisited
programme.desc: Liverpool v AC Milan. Gabby Logan presents another chance to see the memorable final at Ataturk Stadium in Istanbul. A talented Milan side raced into a 3-0 half-time lead, but the likes of Steven Gerrard, Vladimir Smicer and Jerzy Dudek did everything they could to ensure Liverpool would no go down without a fight. With analysis from Terry Venables and Steve McManaman, and commentary by Clive Tyldesley and Andy Townsend

programme.title: European Cup Winners: The British Pioneers
programme.desc: A look back at the early achievements of British clubs in Europe, including Celtic's European Cup triumph in 1967, and Manchester United's victory the following year, which came a decade after the Munich air disaster

programme.title: Harry's Heroes: Euro Having a Laugh
programme.desc: In the final episode, Harry, John and the team embark on the final leg of the tour in Germany, as they prepare to face their arch-rivals at the Wacker Arena in Burghausen. After checking into their Hotel in the Bavarian Alps, Harry receives the German team sheet, leaving him concerned his team are going to have to massively step up their game. With the fear of the match going to penalties hanging over their head, Harry brings in a German psychologist to offer some advice. Finally the big day arrives, and Harry has managed to recruit Manchester United legend Teddy Sheringham, so the team finally has its missing striker

programme.title: Golf: PGA Tour Highlights
programme.desc: The 3M Open. Highlights of the tournament from TPC Twin Cities in Blaine, Minnesota

programme.title: Gran Torino (2008)
programme.desc: Misanthropic Korean War veteran Walt leads an isolated existence, and has a tense relationship with his family and nothing but contempt for his neighbours. When a teenager attempts to steal his prized car, he ends up trying to reform the thief, making a connection with the boy's relatives and defending them from a street gang. Drama, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. With Christopher Carley and Bee Vang

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Gran Torino (2008)
programme.desc: Misanthropic Korean War veteran Walt leads an isolated existence, and has a tense relationship with his family and nothing but contempt for his neighbours. When a teenager attempts to steal his prized car, he ends up trying to reform the thief, making a connection with the boy's relatives and defending them from a street gang. Drama, directed by and starring Clint Eastwood. With Christopher Carley and Bee Vang

programme.title: Fishing Impossible
programme.desc: The team is in Kenya in search of the Nile perch. To catch it, the anglers must endure a 500-kilometre, bone-shaking drive to Lake Turkana across some of Kenya's toughest terrain, braving torrential downpours, sandstorms and the desert heat

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: World Cup Rivalries: England v Argentina
programme.desc: Short sports film about this compelling sporting rivalry.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar investigates when a trusted diplomat friend goes missing with $1million, while his daughter is adducted. Robert Hardy guest stars, with Roger Moore

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Robin is trapped on a lonely hillside by the Sheriff's men, and sacrifices his life so that Much and Marian can escape. Michael Praed stars, making his last appearance as the legendary hero

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: Dempsey finds himself the target of a crazed female admirer. Guest starring Elizabeth Sladen and Suzi Quatro

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur's prestige as a pillar of the community is boosted by an invitation to address a meeting of his local Rotary Club - which is being held in the very hotel where Terry is acting as temporary house detective. However, a pair of thieves posing as priests and a mangeress equally as crooked as Arthur threaten to ruin his grand moment. Drama, starring George Cole and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie's schoolteacher girlfriend seeks CI5's assistance to quash a drug-smuggling ring after learning a 14-year-old pupil is involved having used then hidden a discarded firearm. The body count soon increases at an alarming rate as potential witnesses to a crime are killed off by the ruthless gang. Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Celia Gregory star

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan and Carter investigate when a fellow officer is coerced into acting as a getaway driver by the gangsters who have kidnapped his wife. Police drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman, and featuring a guest appearance by Billy Murray

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Simon Templar has to undergo training to become a mercenary in an attempt to foil a hijacking. Roger Moore stars

programme.title: Robin of Sherwood
programme.desc: Part two of two. Robert of Huntingdon assumes the mantle of Robin Hood as the re-formed band of outlaws resolves to rescue Marion from Clun. Fantasy drama, starring Jason Connery, with Ray Winstone, Judi Trott and Phil Davis

programme.title: Dempsey and Makepeace
programme.desc: An international banker is held to ransom, providing Makepeace with an ideal opportunity to prove a point to her chauvinistic partner as she too gets caught up in the hostage situation. Michael Brandon and Glynis Barber star

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Terry intervenes in a tug-of-love dispute concerning an Anglo-Italian Mancini family, and finds himself unwittingly threatening the success of Arthur's latest money-making venture - a health club. Dennis Waterman and George Cole star

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: Featuring George Best, Zaire's 1974 World Cup campaign and a selection of own goals

programme.title: European Cup - Champions League Revisited
programme.desc: Manchester United v Chelsea. Steve Rider presents a look back at the showpiece match at Luzhniki Stadium in Moscow, as two English teams contested the final of this competition for the first time. programme.title: Harry's Heroes: Euro Having a Laugh
programme.desc: In the final episode, Harry, John and the team embark on the final leg of the tour in Germany, as they prepare to face their arch-rivals at the Wacker Arena in Burghausen. After checking into their Hotel in the Bavarian Alps, Harry receives the German team sheet, leaving him concerned his team are going to have to massively step up their game. With the fear of the match going to penalties hanging over their head, Harry brings in a German psychologist to offer some advice. Finally the big day arrives, and Harry has managed to recruit Manchester United legend Teddy Sheringham, so the team finally has its missing striker

His first stop is the New York community of Congers, where he hopes to save family-run Italian restaurant Bella Gianna's. Gordon and his team work round the clock to clean the premises, remodel the interior and revamp the menu, while also teaching the staff to prepare new dishes and work together as an efficient unit. Can Gordon get this stubborn owner to finally accept his advice and secure the future of his restaurant?

Self-confessed recluses, this is their first dinner party, so it remains to be seen how they cope having company round. They are followed by young couple Lloyd and Molly, who serve up a Thai menu, and bringing up the rear are Pete and Kirsty, with an evening themed around the letter P. Can they pocket the prize with perfect points? It's doubtful, but as ever it'll be fun seeing how they do

He is paired up with Bradford dance instructor Lauren, who also performs as Mel B in a Spice Girls tribute act, but she promises she is nowhere near as loud or scary as her famous counterpart. Also being paired up are tango-loving Trudi and retired art lecturer Michael. Will one dance be enough to convince the singletons to meet up for a proper date?

As both parents begin disastrous new relationships, the youngster is forced to develop an unexpected maturity to cope with her situation. Drama, starring Julianne Moore and Steve Coogan

programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways
programme.desc: Rob Bell heads to the industrial heartlands of north-east England, beginning on Wearside, where he learns about the world's first railway designed for steam locomotives. Rob also visits the ‘living' museum at Beamish and rides a railway from George Stephenson's day, following an old line into Hartlepool, where a medieval port was turned into a mega-centre of coal, rail and shipping in just one generation

programme.title: How to Stop Your Nuisance Calls
programme.desc: An investigation into the plague of nuisance and scam callers, such as incessant calls about PPI or accidents that never happened. Alexis Conran tells the stories of victims like Jeff, who lost £20,000 to fraudsters pretending to be his bank, and Jessica, who was brainwashed into thinking she was being monitored by the FBI. Alexis also meets police, bank representatives and members of the call centre industry to ask whether enough is being done to help, and reveals just what people can do to stop these callers

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Chris travels through the Middle East to explore what remains of the colonial railways, which were built there more than 100 years ago. In the Wadi Rum valley, Chris boards a steam train along one of the few bits of the Hejaz railway that remains in working use, following the route through Jordan, before crossing the border into Israel as he heads for Jerusalem, which is sacred to more than half of the world's population. Along the way, Chris visits the ancient city of Petra, as well as Haifa and Tel Aviva

programme.title: The Secret World of Your Rubbish
programme.desc: Documentary meeting people dedicated to keeping Britain tidy. The aptly named Crapper and Sons run a landfill site in Wiltshire where they oversee the disposal of more than 200 trucks of waste a day. But with space running out and landfill losing favour, the father and son need to find new ways of keeping their rubbish dynasty alive. The film also follows two technicians at a sewage works in west London, who have the unenviable task of removing the wet wipes and other rubbish that gets flushed down people's U-bends, and a team of litter collectors at Marylebone Station

programme.title: Levi Bellfield: 5 Mistakes That Caught a Killer
programme.desc: An investigation into the case of doorman and car clamper Levi Bellfield, who committed three murders - including that of schoolgirl Milly Dowler in 2002. But would he have gone on to claim even more victims had he not made a string of mistakes that alerted police? Interviews with detectives, including the officer who interrogated Bellfield, as well as a former partner of the murderer, reveal the errors that led to his arrest

programme.title: April Jones: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the murder of five-year-old April Jones in 2012, featuring previously unheard tapes of the 18 hours of interviews the police conducted with killer Mark Bridger, who was arrested within 24 hours of April being reported missing and charged four days later. The programme also features contributions from forensic psychologist Dr Joe Sullivan and April's family, who share their distress at her body remaining undiscovered

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Psychologists and criminology experts analyse the crimes of cinema entrepreneur Peter Moore, who brutally murdered four men in Wales in 1995

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed

programme.title: QE2: The World's Most Luxurious Hotel
programme.desc: Documentary following life aboard the most famous ocean liner in the world, now a floating hotel in Dubai. Valentine's Day sees two big events happening on board - a lavish brunch for 450 people in the main dining room, followed by a romantic opera gala dinner out on deck. With guests paying top dollar for both, expectations are huge. However, a late delivery threatens to derail the brunch preparations and - adding to the presage of doom - a storm spotted on the horizon seems set to put the kibosh on the open-air element of the gathering

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Diary (2001)

Romantic comedy based on Helen Fielding's novel, starring Renee Zellweger, Hugh Grant and Colin Firth

programme.title: Police Code Zero: Officer Under Attack

In Liverpool, a terrified officer issues an urgent call for help while hanging out of the passenger side of his own police car - the result of a criminal in handcuffs stealing trying to use it as a getaway vehicle

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: Highlights of the singer's travels around Scotland, which including a journey around the Inner Hebrides that put Jane in touch with her Scottish roots

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice stresses the importance of first impressions, showing a couple from Portishead, Somerset, how to spruce up the exterior of their bungalow to make it look inviting. She also offers ideas on suitable colour schemes to use inside the home, demonstrating how neutral tones can create an airy, spacious atmosphere

programme.title: Thoroughly Modern Millie (1967)
programme.desc: A naive woman leaves her rural roots behind to seek fortune and romance in 1920s New York. She finds work as a secretary to a business tycoon, but he happens to be madly in love with her friend. However, before long she is wooed instead by a smitten salesman. Meanwhile, back at her boarding house, she stumbles across a shocking criminal enterprise involving the landlady. Musical comedy, with Julie Andrews, James Fox and Mary Tyler Moore

programme.title: Akeelah and the Bee (2006)
programme.desc: A clever girl from a poor neighbourhood finds school frustrating and tries to hide her intelligence from her classmates. When she competes in a spelling competition, she is surprised to win and with the aid of a strict coach, sets out to take part in a national tournament and provide her community with something to rally round. Drama, starring Keke Palmer, Laurence Fishburne and Angela Bassett

programme.title: Hulk (2003)
programme.desc: Scientist Dr Bruce Banner turns into the rampaging green Hulk after exposure to a huge dose of gamma radiation, prompting the military to embark on a no-holds-barred mission to destroy the monster. Meanwhile, Banner's unstable father resurfaces, holding the secret to his transformation. Comic-book adventure from director Ang Lee, starring Eric Bana, Jennifer Connelly, Sam Elliott and Nick Nolte

programme.title: Warcraft (2016)
programme.desc: A kingdom stands on the brink of war when it is invaded by a vast horde of creatures who have travelled through a portal from their dying world. As dark magic works its influence on the world, two leaders from either side are set on a collision course with each other as they strive to protect their people. Fantasy adventure based on the best-selling computer game, starring Travis Fimmel, Paula Patton and Ben Foster

programme.title: Cold War (2018)
programme.desc: A musical director and a young singer are in love, but are doomed to be separated by differing loyalties and the Iron Curtain. Pawel Pawlikowski's award-winning drama, starring Joanna Kulig, Tomasz Kot and Borys Szyc. In Polish/French/Croatian/German/Russian/Italian with English subtitles

programme.title: Lucy (2014)
programme.desc: A courier is kidnapped and forced to become a drug mule. When she is exposed to the experimental chemicals she is smuggling, it boosts her intelligence and reflexes to superhuman levels. She uses her newfound abilities to get revenge on her captors, but as the process continues, she evolves into something more than human. Sci-fi thriller, starring Scarlett Johansson and Morgan Freeman

programme.title: Alpha: The Right to Kill (2018)
programme.desc: During a police raid to catch a drug kingpin in Manila, a corrupt cop and his informant go on the run with a bag full of meth. But when an entire has been locked down, how long can they evade capture? Drama, starring Allen Dizon, Elijah Filamor and Angela Cortez. In Filipino/Tagalog with English subtitles

programme.title: Tell (2014)
programme.desc: In the latest of a series of botched crimes, Ethan Tell and his brother-in-law Ray attempt to blackmail a man for his sexual indiscretions. However, they don't expect him to open fire on the duo. Crime drama, starring Milo Ventimiglia, Katee Sackhoff and Jason Lee

programme.title: Capture the Flag (2015)
programme.desc: A young surfer and his friends try to prevent a devious plan to change the course of history when a ruthless billionaire sets out to stop the moon landings from happening, so that he can gain control of a valuable energy source. Animated sci-fi adventure, with the voices of Sam Fink, Phillipa Alexander and Lorraine Pilkington

programme.title: Run Wild, Run Free (1969)
programme.desc: Withdrawn, mute 10-year-old Philip is ignored by his parents and goes off to explore Dartmoor alone, where he meets a retired colonel who shares his knowledge of Devon's wildlife. Under the older man's nurturing tutelage, the boy begins to tame a wild white colt, but fate proffers a series of setbacks just as real progress is being made. Children's drama, starring John Mills, Mark Lester, Sylvia Syms and Bernard Miles

programme.title: Garfield 2: A Tale of Two Kitties (2006)
programme.desc: The lazy moggy stows away in his owner's luggage and ends up in London. He is promptly mistaken for an English upper-class cat, who has recently inherited a grand estate, and moves into his stately home - much to the dismay of the real aristocratic feline's conniving relation, who is bent on swindling him out of his money. Family comedy, starring Breckin Meyer, Billy Connolly and Jennifer Love Hewitt, with the voices of Bill Murray and Tim Curry

programme.title: Home Alone 3 (1997)
programme.desc: Cheeky eight-year-old Alex Pruitt is delighted to be given a remote-controlled toy car by his neighbour - unaware it contains a stolen microchip. A gang of crooks heads to Alex's town with the intention of recovering the valuable item, but the resourceful youngster has prepared for their arrival with a series of nasty booby-traps. Comedy sequel, starring Alex D Linz, Olek Krupa, Rya Kihlstedt and Lenny von Dohlen

programme.title: Only the Brave (2017)
programme.desc: Eric Marsh, the superintendent of a group of elite firefighters, is pushed to his limit when he and his crew tackle a historic wildfire. Fact-based drama, starring Josh Brolin, Jennifer Connelly and Andie MacDowell. Directed by Joseph Kosinski, helmer of Tron: Legacy and Top Gun: Maverick

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit (2014)
programme.desc: A former soldier injured in the line of duty takes up a new career as a financial analyst for the CIA. However, his deskbound position changes to a dangerous undercover assignment when he discovers a plot to destroy the US economy. Spy thriller inspired by Tom Clancy's series of novels, starring Chris Pine, Keira Knightley, Kevin Costner and Kenneth Branagh, who also directed

programme.title: Sabotage (2014)
programme.desc: The members of an elite Drug Enforcement Administration team secretly keep the millions of dollars they find during the raid. When they are killed off one by one, the leader becomes convinced one of his men is getting rid of the others to keep all the money, and sets out to expose the murderer. Action thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger and Sam Worthington

programme.title: Quadrophenia (1979)
programme.desc: A teenager in 1960s London is unhappy with his lot in life, but believes he has found a place to belong in the mod subculture and their feud with the rival rockers. As the mods gather in Brighton for a weekend that turns to violence, his naive vision of the world is cruelly shattered. Drama based on the Who album, starring Phil Daniels, Leslie Ash, Sting and Ray Winstone

programme.title: The Rugrats Movie (1998)
programme.desc: Tommy tries to return his new brother to the baby shop, helped by Angelica, Chuckie, Phil and Lil - but the friends become lost in dense woodlands en route, turning their expedition into a scary and exciting journey of discovery. Animated comedy based on the TV series, with the voices of Elizabeth Daily, Christine Cavanaugh, Kath Soucie, Whoopi Goldberg and Busta Rhymes

programme.title: Step Up All In (2014)
programme.desc: A Miami street dancer faces a series of setbacks as he seeks his fortune in Hollywood. He assembles a team of dancers which prove successful in a reality TV contest broadcast from Las Vegas, but struggles to put aside old conflicts in the pursuit of his dreams. Fifth film in the dance drama series, starring Ryan Guzman and Briana Evigan

programme.title: Shark Tale (2004)
programme.desc: Ambitious fish Oscar dreams of escaping his humdrum undersea life. His wish comes true when a gangster shark keen to escape a world of organised crime seeks his help in faking his own death. But Oscar soon finds himself out of his depth as his fearsome reputation gets out of control. Animated comedy, with the voices of Will Smith, Robert De Niro, Martin Scorsese, Renee Zellweger, Angelina Jolie and Jack Black

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes (1969)
programme.desc: A second astronaut arrives on the strange simian-dominated world searching for his predecessor. As he journeys into the infamous forbidden zone, he discovers an underground cult of psychic mutants. Meanwhile, a military coup has taken place among the ape society, leading to an inevitable battle. Sci-fi sequel, with James Franciscus, Charlton Heston and Kim Hunter

programme.title: Star Trek Into Darkness (2013)
programme.desc: Captain Kirk and the crew of the starship Enterprise are sent on a clandestine mission into enemy territory to track down the rogue Starfleet agent behind a terrorist attack on Earth. However, the assignment brings to light a hidden threat from within their own organisation. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Chris Pine, Zachary Quinto and Benedict Cumberbatch

programme.title: Star Trek Beyond (2016)
programme.desc: The USS Enterprise sets out on a rescue mission which turns out to be a deadly trap set by a mysterious warlord. The crew are left stranded on an unexplored planet, and join forces with a fugitive alien scavenger to find a way off the hostile world and prevent a terrible weapon being unleashed upon the galaxy. Sci-fi adventure, starring Chris Pine, Zachary Quinto and Idris Elba

programme.title: Chaos (2005)
programme.desc: A veteran cop and his inexperienced new partner are assigned to investigate a bank heist. At first sight, no money appears to have been stolen. However, it eventually emerges the criminal mastermind behind the robbery had a more complex and profitable scheme in mind - and a possible connection to the detective on his trail. Crime thriller, starring Jason Statham, Ryan Phillippe and Wesley Snipes

programme.title: The Principles of Lust (2003)
programme.desc: An aspiring artist is faced with a dilemma when he is forced to choose between a normal family life with his girlfriend and her son, or a hedonistic whirl of sex, drugs and rock 'n' roll with a risk-taking friend. Drama, starring Alec Newman, Marc Warren, Sienna Guillory and Lara Clifton

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry is shocked when an attractive teaching assistant agrees to go out with him, and Adam and Dana worry that they have missed their chance with their new crushes

programme.desc: After mobster Seamus Murphy threatens Kevin, Holt devises an elaborate plan to hide his husband in a safe house, with Peralta as his guard. programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Sheldon makes friends with an upper-class senior pupil who introduces him to a new field of science. Meanwhile, Mary and George disagree on how to handle Sheldon's blossoming social life

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox is annoyed when Zander decides to move in with two female students at college. Meanwhile, Joe goes against Mel's wishes and agrees to act as a wingman to his recently divorced friend Charlie on a night out. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel's father comes to town to help her announce her candidacy for state senate, but jeopardises his daughter's chances when he sends a racy photo to everyone involved in her campaign after Joe teaches him about selfies. Meanwhile, Ryder tries to find a winning idea for his entrepreneur's club project. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica's new job at the department store is put in jeopardy when Beverly takes advantage of her daughter's employee discount too frequently. Meanwhile, during a trip to the horse racing track, Pops bends the truth to convince Barry that his bad luck has changed for the better. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly and Murray fall out over Barry's plan to perform his martial arts routine at the annual high school talent show. Pops buys Erica an electric guitar, urging her to take to the stage and sing. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad springs into action when Jake and Amy's wedding is jeopardised by a major threat. Holt is reluctant to open the email saying whether he has been appointed Commissioner

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Following a tragic accident in the local community, Mary's faith is shaken. Seeing his mother doubt everything she believes, Sheldon becomes an unlikely ally. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage and Zoe Perry

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.desc: Tired of being taken for granted, Willow agrees to help Anya with a little black magic, unaware the former demon is trying to regain her evil powers. Supernatural adventures, with Sarah Michelle Gellar and Alyson Hannigan

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Faith and the Mayor plot their revenge against Buffy, and conspire to rob Angel of his soul. Meanwhile, Giles unofficially resumes his role of Watcher and Wesley is distracted by Cordelia's amorous attentions. Supernatural adventures, with Sarah Michelle Gellar and Eliza Dushku

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Raj take a heartbroken Howard to Las Vegas, where they pay a prostitute to spend time with him. Meanwhile, Sheldon finds himself locked out of his apartment and forced to stay the night at Penny's. With guest star Jodi Lynn O'Keefe (Prison Break)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys become stranded in the middle of nowhere when Leonard's car is stolen en route to the Bakersfield comic-book convention. Meanwhile, back at home, the women try to work out why the guys are so fascinated with such publications

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Programmes including Strictly Come Dancing, The Andrew Marr Show, Antiques Roadshow, Bodyguard, The Yorkshire Vet, Gareth Malone's All Star Music Quiz and The Circle come under the gaze of the armchair critics, as they share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week. From September 2018

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Divorced couple Stuart and Mandy arrive in the restaurant to offer each other moral support as they try to find love again. Mandy wants an adventurer to whisk her off her feet, and her date, globetrotting Adam, could be just the ticket. Across the restaurant, sparks are also flying as Stuart's cheeky humour has fellow divorcee Claire in stitches. Meanwhile, 30-year-old financial manager J meets aesthetic therapist Sophie, and 23-year-old Nathan has his work cut out to try and win over 21-year-old Morganne

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry needs the money to buy an expensive new pair of basketball trainers, so Murray hires him to work at his furniture shop. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

Cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Desperate for help, Leonard enlists Sheldon to discredit his love rival by preying on his obsession with Batman. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Kevin Sussman star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is not pleased when his assistant Alex starts flirting with Leonard and has a word with her about it. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: Melissa & Joey

programme.title: Melissa & Joey

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly complains that Pops is spending too much time with her at home, so Murray takes him to work at the furniture shop. programme.title: The Goldbergs

Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon, Amy, Leonard and Penny do their best to divide up all their possessions into two separate households, but tension ensues. Raj and Stuart compete to become indispensable to Howard and Bernadette as the baby's arrival looms. Christopher Lloyd (Back to the Future) guest stars

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: The four lads decide to play truant from sixth form and buy alcohol for an all-day drinking session, which is interrupted when Neil's father comes home early. Meanwhile, Simon decides to declare his love for Carli through graffiti, and the friends face the wrath of their parents

programme.desc: Buffy gains the ability to hear people's thoughts - to the horror of her friends, who fear their secrets being exposed. programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer

Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with an appearance by Katee Sackhoff (Battlestar Galactica) as herself

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Showcasing five of the soap's most talked-about storylines. Jennifer Metcalfe and Nick Pickard introduce an episode from 1999. Tony, Lucy, Ruth and Lewis find a way out of the tank, but the danger is far from over for one of the group

programme.desc: During their week apart, Nadia reflects on the pros and cons of her relationship with Anthony. He is reliable and steadfast which makes her feel safe and cared for, but his outspoken nature and stubborn desire to stay in Sydney for the sake of his career has her questioning whether moving for love a second time could end in disaster, as it did in her previous relationship

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny struggles with Leonard's confession that he kissed another woman when he was away on his North Sea research expedition. After driving all the way to Las Vegas, she must now decide whether she wants to go through with the wedding. Back home, Sheldon doesn't know how to act after Amy tells him she wants them to take a relationship break

programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: The students of Sunnydale High look forward to their senior prom, unaware someone is plotting to ruin their big night by unleashing a pack of ferocious hellhounds. programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp demonstrates how to create handmade and personalised gifts. She learns about sugarcraft and perfume-making, and also receives a lesson in the art of designing Victorian-style silhouettes

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Winter Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin advises Jacky and Peter Kennett how far their £150,000 budget will stretch in the Tampa Bay area of Florida in the United States. Having visited the area for many a holiday, they have their eyes on an attractive home in which to spend the winter

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Northamptonshire in search of more upcycling prospects. Simon finds some night vision goggles and an antique snooker table that's seen better days, while Henry chooses an enormous US army truck as one of his picks

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien search for more items to fix up and sell on, visiting a Norman castle, restoring a Fiat 500 and making a table from part of Southend pier

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Billy and Gwendoline rope in Dick to help them put up a chandelier, and then they have to track down some wild boars that are causing chaos in and around the chateau. Clive and Tanith attempt to make a fully self-sufficient dish for their restaurant. Meanwhile at Paul and Karen's chateau, Paul continues the task of converting their water tower into an office - in 33-degree heat

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton comes to the aid of Cheshire architect Matthew Lewis, who is trying to build the perfect home for a very demanding client - his GP wife Hayley

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to the Borgue Hotel in Dumfries and Galloway, which owners Vince and Shirley Barrett run with military precision. On arrival, guests Adam and Naomi are not impressed with the decor, while Ken and Elaine do not like the orange towels. Later, over dinner, the hosts reveal who wears the trousers in their relationship, before Ken's jokes go down like a lead balloon

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Allscott Mill B&B in Telford, Shropshire, on their second night, where hosts Ken and Elaine Purchase welcome their guests. On arrival, Shirely and Vince find fault with the lack of headroom in their lodgings, while Adam and Naomi are bemused by the absence of a toilet brush in their bathroom

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Park House in Llandrindod Wells, Powys, where owners Ian and Joan Barr hope their colourful B&B will impress their guests. Adam and Naomi are wowed by the vibrant decor, but Ken and Elaine take issue with a dirty toilet brush

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Naomi and Adam Black welcome the contestants to East Thorne yurt retreat in Bude, Cornwall. They are pleased to discover it is Vince and Shirley's dream location, but Ken and Elaine don't share the same opinion. Later, the guests take part in an archery competition, and in the morning, are unimpressed with the DIY breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rival owners meet for the final time on the last day of the competition to find out what they've been paid and settle some scores. Hosting skills, breakfasts, facilities and two toilet brush gripes are aired before the cash is counted and the winner is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary capturing the behaviour of the animals at Chester Zoo. Kendari the babirusa - a bizarre-looking creature also known as a deer-pig - is trying to give birth, but is being disturbed by a couple of mischievous otters. Young male orang-utan Willie struggles to impress the females, while Raz the aye-aye, a rare nocturnal primate related to lemurs, is being encouraged to share his home with two jumping rats

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A couple who have spent their lives saving stray animals bring in a three-legged cat called Jersey, who has recently become lame in her single back leg. The vet must decide whether the first-ever hip replacement on a three-legged cat is viable. Plus, a Great Dane is given a custom-designed spinal implant, and a Dogue de Bordeaux gets help with elbow dysplasia

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: At Billy and Gwendoline's chateau, Billy and his father try to level a patio so it can pass health and safety regulations. As Paul and Karen struggle to get the office conversion finished in time, a huge damaged pine tree needs to be cut down

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Mark and Candida Diacono, who have set about building a home in the shape of a plough on their 17-acre smallholding in Devon. With its complex curved roof, timber-clad exterior and steel-framed working barn, the ambitious project presents a unique technical challenge for a local builder and his team of employees, and the task proves even more intimidating when considering Mark and Candida hope to complete work on the build within seven months

programme.title: 24 Hour Baby Hospital
programme.desc: Young couple Sophie and Daryl choice of names are proving confusing for midwife Veronica. Meanwhile, Ciara is getting ready to welcome her second baby

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The A&E staff of King's College Hospital in London treat patients involved in accidents, including a construction worker who broke his leg in three places and suffered injuries to his chest after being trapped under a cherry picker. Plus, a man who fell from a ladder and landed on his head, and a widower who had a nasty encounter with a mandoline while chopping vegetables

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A retired dockworker who suffers from diabetes is brought in with severe stomach pain and doctors believe part of his gut may have permanently stopped working, creating a life-threatening situation where immediate surgery is the only option. Other patients include a man who has twisted his knee dancing in a club, and a cyclist brought in unconscious after falling off his bike

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.desc: The team returns to explore the secrets behind mass-produced food, meeting technicians, scientists, factory owners, growers and producers, finding out exactly what goes into the everyday groceries that end up on the supermarket shelves. Jimmy Doherty finds out how Sri Lanka is coping with a looming coconut shortage, while Kate Quilton discovers whether compostables could be the answer to worldwide plastic pollution problem, annd Matt Tebbutt is in Paris to learn why the macaron has such a hefty price tag

programme.desc: David and Christina Hurst are looking for a holiday home where they can eventually spend several months a year, and Jonnie Irwin shows them how far their £150,000 budget will stretch in Orlando, Florida

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole restores two quad bikes and a stylish sun lounger, while Simon O'Brien rescues a holed canoe and turns an old oak beam into a spice rack

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit Essex, where Henry restores a car trailer and a 1970s racing bike, and Simon turns his attention to lovingly restoring a vintage model aircraft

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: At Billy and Gwendoline's chateau, Billy and his father try to level a patio so it can pass health and safety regulations. As Paul and Karen struggle to get the office conversion finished in time, a huge damaged pine tree needs to be cut down

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton comes to the aid of first-time self-builders Howard Lawrenson and Kevin Taylor who are trying to build a bungalow on a plot overlooking a park in Bolton. The tricky part is that first they have to dig a 15-foot hole to put it in and Charlie is worried that the groundworks will be too much for them. When the build gets off to a bad start, it looks like his fears are well founded with the budget in ruins and cafe owner Howard questioning his own role as project manager. However, a sudden change in finances sets the build on a very different course

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off in Worcestershire, where friends Geri Atterbury and Lorraine Rigby invite guests to stay at Greenways of Malvern. On arrival, couple Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker are not impressed by the wild wallpaper, and the lack of an en-suite dismays mother-and-son duo Sarah and Luke Allaway

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Royal Forester at Bewdley in Worcestershire for their second stay, with proprietors Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker hoping to impress their guests with a trip to a local safari park. Sarah and Luke are impressed with their colourful room, but Sanjeev and Elinor have a 'hairy' experience

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: From Ferry Lodge in Holyhead, Anglesey, where mother-and-son duo Sarah and Luke Allaway hope to impress the other contestants. However, things do not get off to a good start when Geri and Lorraine are overwhelmed by the number of laminated signs, Sean and Maxine begrudge paying 50p for toiletries and Sanjeev and Elinor are left unimpressed by the cleanliness of the establishment

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Partners Sanjeev Bhagotra and Elinor Roberts welcome their guests to Court Colman Manor, Bridgend, Glamorgan. Sean McGahern and Maxine Parker are pleased with the size of their room on arrival, but Sarah Allaway discovers a collection of cobwebs in hers. During the afternoon, the groups take a lesson in fire-making, and the next morning a traditional Welsh breakfast is not to everyone's taste - with the hosts wondering whether tactical voting has played a part come feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet one last time to find out what they have been paid. Geri kicks off proceedings by demanding to know why Sarah and Luke did not want a return visit to Greenways of Malvern, before they in turn confront Sanjeev and Elinor over their low cleanliness score for Ferry Lodge. Then the Court Colman Manor proprietors accuse Sarah and Luke of unfairly judging their hotel, before the payments are revealed and the winners are announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary capturing the behaviour of the animals at Chester Zoo. An outbreak of disease in the penguin colony leaves chick Munch fighting for his life. Sulawesi macaque Lisa gives birth and dad Mamassa is providing pretty useless, so older brother Beaker steps in to help with the babysitting. Andean spectacled bear Bernie is determined to woo Lima when she enters her short window of fertility, and young male tortoise Football muscles in on 71-year-old Bert's harem of females

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick fears the worst when a young cockapoo is hit by a lawnmower, and he faces the challenge of saving as much of its leg as possible. Meanwhile, a seven-year-old labrador struggles with pain in its elbows, and a German Shepherd-Collie cross is suffering with a bulging disk in his spin and hip dysplasia

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Margreeth visit Dick and Angel, who come up with some radical suggestions to change their business plans. Stephanie hopes to prepare for her first singles weekend by planting a romantic rose garden - if she can work the digger. Near the Pyrenees, Sophie and James need to raise funds for their ancient chateau fast, so they decide to put on a day of historic talks, dinner and a tour. Later, Dick and Angel struggle to rescue the trampoline that's been blown into their moat

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets designers Beth Dadswell and Andrew Wilbourne, who have rescued a crumbling Victorian dairy in south-east London and plan to convert it into a family home, while retaining as much of the ramshackle roof, rust and crumbling brickwork as possible. However, as they begin stripping back the old building, the true extent of its condition becomes plain, and the couple have to decide quite how much decay they are willing to live with

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie, Claire and Young Ian's attempt to rescue Roger from his Mohawk captors goes awry when a ghost from Claire's past lays waste to their plan. Brianna worries her family might not return

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole head to Middlesex and Surrey, where projects include repurposing a 1950s hairdryer, updating a school desk and the restoration of a child's motorbike

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel the length of Britain turning unwanted junk into profit for their owners. In this episode they're on the south coast, where Henry gets to work an aircraft fuel tank while Simon gets obsessed with an iconic '60s speedboat

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Margreeth visit Dick and Angel, who come up with some radical suggestions to change their business plans. programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton helps Morag and Heiko Buxel with their continental kit-build home in Stirlingshire. They expect it to take just six weeks to erect their prefabricated family home on the outskirts of their village, but with speed comes pressure as every detail needs to be decided in advance. The couple have an early setback and their summer project becomes a winter struggle. The weather renders the site almost inaccessible as the whole build gets stuck in the mud

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to Tower View Hotel, in Blackpool, where owner Jennifer McGirr is joined by friend Diana Carnegie. Daniel Walker and George Gillespie find some unwanted guests in the bathroom and trouble arises at breakfast when some of the guests try ordering off-menu

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit Church Spa in East Markham in Nottinghamshire on their second evening, where proprietor Daniel Walker and family friend George Gillespie hope to wow their guests with their relaxing facilities. Steve and Lisa Tindall seem impressed, but Jennifer and Diana Carnegie question the high price tag

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third hosts of the week are Steve and Lisa Tindall, who own the King's Head Inn in Rye, East Sussex, where they hope their guests will fall for their boutique B&B. They get into the swing of things with a round of blindfolded mini-golf, but not everyone gets a solid night's sleep afterwards

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former breakfast TV presenter Matt Arnold welcomes the contestants to The Bridge Hotel Brandon in Suffolk, and hopes that his mantra of 'beautiful beds, blissful bathrooms and brilliant breakfasts' shines through. The group takes part in a rowing competition in the afternoon, but delays at breakfast and a runny egg cause irritation

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts meet for the final time to find out what they have been paid and confront their critics, and things get heated when it's time to count up the cash

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Sumatran tiger Kirana faces losing its two cubs, who are fully grown and being moved to other zoos to start families of their own. Indonesian dwarf buffalo Oana, one of Chester's most sensitive animals, gives birth - only for the new mum's anxiety to threaten the calf's health

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Noel Fitzpatrick treats a Labrador that is both a guide for the blind and a seizure alert dog, and has become lame in both its front legs. Invasive surgery could mean that the dog's owner, Toni, is without her lifeline. Meanwhile, a couple hope that surgery will save their Rhodesian Ridgeback's leg from a cancerous tumour, and Fitzpatrick Referrals receptionist Natalie's Tibetan terrier becomes unwell

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Margreeth start to research their new business idea, but can they find the suppliers to help them? Stephanie's big event - her singles night - arrives, while Sophie and James put on a walking tour near their chateau

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud visits a house belonging to an engineer that resembles a giant snake. The building was inspired by an ammonite shell and has a scaly, curving structure that spirals over two levels and combines natural materials with the latest modern technology. However, completing the project within the 12-month schedule may not be possible for mechanical engineer Stephen Tetlow and wife Elizabeth

programme.title: Code 37: Sex Crimes
programme.desc: When Lotte Lambert contacts the police claiming that her sister Eva has been sexually harassed while working at a construction site, Eva denies everything. However, after speaking to Eva, Hannah suspects that she is trying to protect someone. In her personal life, Hannah's relationship with Koen is going from strength to strength. Belgian crime thriller, starring Veerle Baetens and Gilles De Schryver. In Flemish

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A man is brought in with stomach pains and a suspected abdominal aortic aneurysm. His son receives a huge blow when he is told his father only has a 50 per cent chance of surviving the operation he urgently needs. A 33-year-old is treated after swallowing a cocktail of drugs in a suicide attempt, and staff fight to save a teenager who was stabbed in a street fight and has lost a life-threatening amount of blood

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A man with schizophrenia is admitted for the 19th time in a year after failing to take his diabetes medication. Meanwhile, a former betting-shop manager and a 16-year-old both suffer suspected strokes - the 61-year-old, once known as the 'memory man', is now coming to terms with his diminishing mental capabilities, while the teenager's identical twin and mother wait by his bedside for the results of a brain scan

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
